name: fold-stage
description: The engine-agnostic stage layer: committed program frames, the output bus + sinks (recorder, Syphon, external views), and the host-services contract. Shared by Fold, Tap, and future tenants — each supplies an engine adapter (see src/engine-adapter.js) and a host implementation (see src/host.js) and reuses the stage verbatim.
author: Daniel Nelson
